description: Lazy-loading the largest contentful paint image, delaying its fetch and pushing LCP past budget.
body: Failure mode: the hero/LCP image is given loading=lazy, so the browser defers its request and the largest paint lands late, worsening LCP. Detection signals: a trace shows the LCP element fetched after first paint; the hero image has loading=lazy; LCP regresses while total bytes look fine. Do not lazy-load the element responsible for LCP. Safer fallback: eager-load and preload the LCP image with reserved dimensions, lazy-load only offscreen media, and confirm LCP returns within budget in a fresh trace.
